title: knowltonia peruviana
intro: Knowltonia peruviana, also known as the Peruvian tree daisy or yellow daisy, is a flowering plant native to the Andean region of Peru. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Knowltonia peruviana is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
